verses.text: Jessi' phung sung panin a sel khat hong khangkhia ding a, a zungte panin a no khat hong khang ding hi
Topa' kha in ama tungah ama mite a ukna ding pilna, thutheihna, leh siamna pia ding hi. Amah in Topa' deihna thei-in Topa zahtak ding hi
Amah in Topa' nasep nuamsa ding hi. Amah in a tungtham bek muhna tawh thu khenlo ding a, kam lengsawn bek zakna tawh thu khentatlo ding hi

Thumanna tawh mizawngte' thu khenin, lungsim neem mite' thu ahi bangin khensak ding hi. Ama kam panin a thupiakna tawh leitung mite gim kipia ding a, a muk panin a thugenna tawh migilote si ding uh hi
Amah in thuman leh thutak tawh ama mite uk ding hi
Keivom pen tuuno tawh omkhawm ding a, kamkei gialbem pen keelno tawh lumkhawm ding hi. Bawngno leh humpinelkai leh ganhing thaute omkhawm ding uh a, naupangno khat nangawn in tuate hawlzo ding hi
Bawngpi leh vompi in an nekhawm ding uh a, amau' note lumkhawm ding uh hi. Humpinelkai in bawngtal mah bangin buhkung ne ding hi
Nawine naungek, gul gilo' kua vangah kimawl ding a, nawine nawnlo naupang in gul gunei' bu a sawk hangin a gul in tulo ding hi

Ka mual siangtho buppi tungah amaute khatlekhat kiliamsak lo ding uh a, kisusia lo ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuite in tuipi omna a tuamcip mah bangin leitungah Topa' thu theihna kidim ding hi
Tua ni ciangin Jessi' zung pen mihingte' tungah lim khat hi ding hi. Minamte in amah zong ding uh a, ama omna mun minthang mahmah ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: A Suakta Laite Gualzo-in A Ciahkikna

verses.text: Tua ni ciangin Topa in Assiria gam, Egypt gam, Pathros gam, Ethiopia gam, Elam gam, Shinar gam, Hamath gam, leh tuipi gei-a gamte panin ama mi a omlaite a ngahkikna dingin a vangliatna zang kik ding hi
Amah in minamte-a' dingin lim khat koih ding a, Israel mi a kihawlkhiate kaikhawmin, leitung kiu li panin Judah mi a kikhenthangte kaikhawm ding hi
Efraim in hazatna lungsim a neihnate bei ding a, Judah mi a galbawlte kisusia ding hi. Efraim in Judah haza nawnlo ding a, Judah in zong Efraim galbawl lo ding hi

Ahih hangin amaute in nitumna lama om Filistia mite simkhawm ding uh a, nisuahna lama om mite luhkhawm ding uh hi. Amaute in Edom mite leh Moab mite zogawp ding uh a, Ammon mite in amau' thu mang ding uh hi
Topa in ama huihsa nungsakin Nail gunpi leh Eufratis gunpi tuite kangsak ding a, mi khempeuh in nuamtakin a kantan zawh ding lui neu sagih bek sitlai ding hi
Egypt gam panin Israel-te hong paitoh ciangin amau-a' dingin lam lianpi khat a om mah bangin, ama mi a omlaite-a' dingin Assiria gam panin zong lam lianpi khat om ding hi.
